title: SSHAssetComponent
description: Run shell commands on a remote host via SSH as a Dagster asset. Supports private key (content or file path), password authentication, SFTP file transfer, and real-time log streaming.

asset_name.description: Dagster asset key for this component.

host_env_var.description: Name of the environment variable containing the hostname or IP address of the remote host.

username_env_var.description: Name of the environment variable containing the SSH username.

private_key_env_var.description: Name of the environment variable containing the PEM-encoded SSH private key content (not a file path).

private_key_path_env_var.description: Name of the environment variable containing the path to an SSH private key file on disk. Takes precedence over private_key_env_var when both are set.

password_env_var.description: Name of the environment variable containing the SSH password. Used as a fallback when no private key option is provided.

port.description: SSH port on the remote host.

known_hosts_check.description: When false (default), AutoAddPolicy is applied so unknown host keys are accepted automatically — suitable for automated environments. Set to true to enforce system known_hosts validation.

commands.description: Ordered list of shell commands to execute on the remote host.

working_dir.description: Remote directory to change into before each command (prepended as 'cd <working_dir> && ').

fail_on_non_zero.description: Raise an exception when any command exits with a non-zero status code.

capture_output.description: Stream each command's stdout to the Dagster run log as INFO messages.

sftp_upload.description: If provided, upload a local file to the remote host via SFTP before running commands.

local_path.description: Path to the local file to upload.

remote_path.description: Destination path on the remote host.

sftp_download.description: If provided, download a remote file to the local filesystem via SFTP after all commands complete.

remote_path.description: Path to the file on the remote host.

local_path.description: Destination path on the local filesystem.

description.description: Human-readable description surfaced in the Dagster UI.

deps.description: Upstream asset keys this asset depends on.
